name: Fried Rice #5
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Rice cooked and cooled in refrigerator a few hours
4 Pork chops cooked or an equal amount of roast pork, sliced into matchstick pieces
Half a chicken cooked and sliced into matchstick pieces
1 lb Shrimp peeled, deveined, and cooked
1 Green onion diagonally sliced for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or large frying pan, saute meat in oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add shrimp, then onion, mushrooms, and garlic powder, stirring after each addition.
3. Sprinkle soy sauce to taste. If desired, add oysters and bean sprouts.
4. Make a well in the center of the mixture and pour in about 1 tablespoon of oil.
5. Break up pre-cooked rice and crumble into the oil well, gradually incorporating rice into the meat mixture.
6. Stir in scrambled eggs, place on a platter, and top the fried rice with green onions.
7. Garnish the sides of the rice with tomato quarters and lemon slices.
